title: araucaria rulei var. polymorpha
intro: Araucaria rulei var. polymorpha, also known as the Frenel or Frenel Pine, is a variant of the Araucaria rulei tree native to New Caledonia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Araucaria rulei var. polymorpha include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often combining it with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
